content: Analyze existing TypeScript code structure and identify gaps compared to Python implementation
Set up enhanced TypeScript configuration following Py2TS guidelines
Create comprehensive type definitions in src/types.ts
Implement SparseNeuroVol class with custom sparse matrix support
Implement LogicalNeuroVol class for binary volumes
Implement ClusteredNeuroVol class
Create base NeuroVec interface and implement DenseNeuroVec
Implement SparseNeuroVec for 4D sparse data
Implement BigNeuroVec with memory-mapped support
Complete ROI functionality (ROIVol, ROIVec)
Enhance I/O with async operations and multi-format support
Implement searchlight analysis with Web Workers
Add statistical operations module
Create test migration framework and convert Python tests
Create orthogonalSlices.ts module with world-coordinate slice extraction
Implement extractOrthogonalSlices function
Implement individual slice extractors (axial, sagittal, coronal)
Add helper functions for slice orientation and bounds
Create comprehensive tests for orthogonal slice extraction
Export orthogonal slice functions from index.ts
